blockingIssues.description: SupplierStatus enum values wrong: docs say PENDING_APPROVAL, code is PENDING (SupplierStatus.java)
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Change PENDING_APPROVAL to PENDING in Section 1 enum table and Section 3 status flow table/diagram

blockingIssues.description: PurchaseOrderStatus enum values wrong: docs say VOIDED, code is VOID; docs miss INVOICED status entirely (PurchaseOrderStatus.java)
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Change VOIDED to VOID in Section 1 enum table. Add INVOICED status. Update Section 4 flow diagram and status table to include INVOICED between FULLY_RECEIVED and CLOSED.

blockingIssues.description: GoodsReceiptStatus values completely wrong: docs say PENDING→POSTED, code has PARTIAL/RECEIVED/INVOICED (GoodsReceiptStatus.java)
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Replace PENDING→POSTED flow in Section 5 with actual values PARTIAL, RECEIVED, INVOICED. Update Section 1 enum table.

blockingIssues.description: PO status transition model significantly wrong: misses INVOICED step, VOID allowed only from DRAFT/APPROVED not PARTIALLY_RECEIVED, close only from INVOICED not FULLY_RECEIVED (PurchaseOrderService.isValidTransition)
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Update Section 4 flow diagram to: DRAFT→APPROVED→PARTIALLY_RECEIVED→FULLY_RECEIVED→INVOICED→CLOSED, with VOID from DRAFT and APPROVED only. Update close constraint to 'Can only close POs in INVOICED status'.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Supplier activation path incomplete: docs only show APPROVED→ACTIVE, code also allows SUSPENDED→ACTIVE
Payable account code suffix collision logic not documented. Docs say 'must not already exist' but code auto-resolves with suffix
PO void and close constraints in Section 4 text contradict the flow diagram and actual code
